title: Spectrophotometric Determination of Nickel(II) after Adsorption of its Complex with 2-(Naphthalidine)pyridine on Polyurethane Foam
author: PRITI CHANDAK
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Applied Chemistry & Chemical Technology, Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University, Ajmer-305 001 

  Manuscript received /6 May 1996, revised 17 March 1997, accepted 16 May 1997  

 The present communication describes an inexpensive, accurate, reproducible, selective and sensitive method for the photometric determination of nickel(II) with 2-(naphthalidine)pyridine. The effects of pH, reagent concentration, adsorbent, shaking time and diverse metal ions on absorbance studies have been investigated. Conditions have been optimized for the determination of Ni II  in alloys.
